privileged_info_summary: The potluck conflict resolver task uses synthetic data: a CSV with 15 sign-up entries containing exactly 3 appetizer dishes, 3 mains, 3 sides, and 6 desserts (40% imbalance). Total servings sum to 327 (8.2 per person for a 40-person event). The dataset contains exactly 2 peanut allergen concerns (Thai Peanut Noodles and Peanut Butter Brownies) and 3 cookie-type desserts. All numeric and categorical claims in the README and setup scripts are verified against the actual embedded CSV data.
